query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_products,
  COUNT(DISTINCT image1Url) as unique_image1,
  COUNT(DISTINCT image2Url) as unique_image2,
  SUM(CASE WHEN image1Url IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_image1,
  SUM(CASE WHEN image2Url IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_image2,
  SUM(CASE WHEN image1Url LIKE '/products/%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as local_image1,
  SUM(CASE WHEN image1Url LIKE 'https://%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as external_image1,
  SUM(CASE WHEN image2Url LIKE '/products/%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as local_image2,
  SUM(CASE WHEN image2Url LIKE 'https://%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as external_image2
FROM products;
